scripts.setup:
npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env')){fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env');console.log('
✅  Created .env from .env.example
⚠️  Open .env and set MEDIA_DIR to your media folder path, then run: npm run dev
');}else{console.log('✅  .env already exists');}"
scripts.dev: node sync-env.js && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan" "npm run server" "npm run client"
